title: Contact Person
description: A contact person for an organisation.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description:
First name.

**Constraints**: Only letters, digits, spaces, and hyphens are allowed. *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

lastName.title: Last Name
lastName.description:
Last name.

**Constraints**: Only letters, digits, spaces, and hyphens are allowed. *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

role.title: Role
role.description:
The contact person's role in the organisation.

**Constraints**: *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

comments.title: Additional Comments
comments.description:
Additional comments about how to make contact.

**Constraints**: *Maximum length*: 5000 characters.

examples.comments: Prefer to be contacted by email.
